message:
fix: update wisp table references in UpdateIssueID (bd-od40)

UpdateIssueID was updating permanent tables (dependencies, events,
labels, comments) but not wisp tables. This left dangling references
in wisp_dependencies, wisp_events, wisp_labels, and wisp_comments
after a rename. Add UPDATE statements for all four wisp tables,
including both issue_id and depends_on_id columns in wisp_dependencies.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
